events.text: Goal! Uruguay 0, Spain 1. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Marcos Llorente with a cross.
Substitution, Uruguay. Nicolás de la Cruz replaces Manuel Ugarte because of an injury.
Substitution, Uruguay. Sergio Rochet replaces Fernando Muslera.
Álex Baena (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Juan Manuel Sanabria (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Uruguay. Federico Viñas replaces Federico Valverde.
Guillermo Varela (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.
Substitution, Spain. Dani Olmo replaces Mikel Merino.
Substitution, Spain. Yéremy Pino replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Uruguay. Brian Rodríguez replaces Juan Manuel Sanabria.
Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Lamine Yamal.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.
Nicolás de la Cruz (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Agustín Canobbio (Uruguay) is shown the red card.
